case_title: WHITE, RICHARD C. VS REED, TAMARA: MANAGER C/O THE MARINA CLUB et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $855.00 FILED BY WHITE, RICHARD C. AS TO DEFENDANT REED, TAMARA: MANAGER C/O THE MARINA CLUB THE MARINA CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REED, TAMARA: MANAGER C/O THE MARINA CLUB

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, RICHARD C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE MARINA CLUB $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $39.00, PLTF SHALL NOT PAY MEMBERSHIP DUES AT MARINA CLUB FOR 5/95-5/96. BESIDES COURT COSTS OF $39 NO OTHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
